title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Terraria: The Board Game**
*2026*
Dig, fight, explore and build in this co-op adventure for 1-4 intrepid Terrarians!
![Terraria: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_3291c15a.jpg)

2. **Rolling Deep**
*2027*
Journey to the Center of the Earth in this Balatro-inspired roguelike dice game.
![Rolling Deep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_4f93fb5c.jpg)

3. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_8aba6cc3.png)

4. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_1102511a.png)

5. **Compania**
*2025*
Grow your fledgling company to become the richest in the world of Factoria.
![Compania](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_65f3ce32.png)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_14a57e45.png)

7. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_472bfae3.png)

8. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_e675f606.jpg)

9. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_2a567efd.jpg)

10. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_fb77875b.png)

11. **Spooky Tower**
*2026*
Ghost hunters race to protect the town.
![Spooky Tower](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_d2da6784.png)

12. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_71b7e751.jpg)

13. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_fc3de1e1.jpg)

14. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-control game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_70455e30.jpg)

15. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_f733c3f4.jpg)

16. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_51f9ad2f.jpg)

17. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_e81eb45b.jpg)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_aaa61058.jpg)

19. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_41eb08c6.png)

20. **Dark Pact**
*2026*
Be the first occultist to build a deck to fulfill one of thirteen unique Dark Pacts.
![Dark Pact](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_d8b59bf2.jpg)

21. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_c42a0cd7.jpg)

22. **The Secret Valley**
*2021*
Migrate to new territories in search of the mysterious Secret Valley.
![The Secret Valley](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_27e5723f.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_68e10936.jpg)

24. **Medici**
*1995*
Rival merchant families seek profitable markets in 15th century Florence.
![Medici](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_047f7ea8.png)

25. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_7b787057.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_c645251c.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_06df79b1.jpg)

*52 months on the list*

![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_fc537f87.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_31bd30ca.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_f3e4201a.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_1475bb26.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_b152a4b0.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_01f0f190.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_8e498ad8.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_101a94a4.jpg)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*

![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_53855905.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*

![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-12/toplist/bgg_1b8ab264.jpg)
